titles.title: Expressing the need for the Senate to provide advice and consent to ratification of the United Nations Convention on Biological Diversity.
Expressing the need for the Senate to provide advice and consent to ratification of the United Nations Convention on Biological Diversity.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Foreign Affairs.

bill.summary: This concurrent resolution expresses that it is in the national interest for the Senate to provide its advice and consent for the ratification of the Convention on Biological Diversity.
